title: The Truth of the Void Century Spreads
description: On pages 15–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Zoro, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Sanji, Luffy as Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.
scene: Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: captains! The flames will block off the forest!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: No, we have to hurry! These guys...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then let's get a move on! Are they really immortal?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No idea, but no matter what I do, they keep coming back!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've never heard of any race or ability granting that kind of power!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We may be running, but I still count this as a victory! Gaba BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BA BABA BABA BABA BABA BABA BABA BABA BABA BABA BABA BABABA BABABA BABA BABA BABA BABA BABA BABA

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: It's faster to just run normally!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: in front of the ship!! Look!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Where's the room displayed on the Monitor?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: it spoke!! Who are you?! leave me be!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Are you hurt?! Let us treat you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: We should attend to them right away!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Something way bigger than a giant just showed up...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: The flames aren't even phasing it...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's like a Titan in the middle of an inferno...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: And it seems to be growling something!!

summary: This part advances the Vegapunk’s Broadcast through 36 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
